falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a key resistance level would invalidate the consolidation/HOLD signal by indicating a strong bullish trend.

falsification_conditions.condition: NASDAQ daily trading volume exceeds 10 billion shares for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a major market shift, contradicting the current HOLD by implying a decisive price move.

falsification_conditions.condition: CBOE VIX index drops below 18 in 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX below 18 would indicate extreme complacency, directly contradicting the blowoff score of 38 which suggests heightened volatility/pressure.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
